consequence_relation.name: typed action/state bridge derivability
consequence_relation.notes: The profile keeps action and state propositions in separate types and connects them only through explicit bridge principles.

metalogical_properties.description: Action obligations range over predicates on action steps; state obligations range over predicates on states.
State obligations and prohibitions can induce action obligations and prohibitions only through explicit realization/avoidance bridges.

normative_systems.description: Required and forbidden action predicates are stored per situation.
Required and forbidden state predicates are stored per situation.
Binary agglomeration yields a more specific required action candidate.
Forbidden-action agglomeration yields a more general forbidden action candidate.

permission_families.description: This profile focuses on obligations, prohibitions, and bridges rather than permission families.

formalization_targets.reason: Represented in Lean by separate ActionStep and State predicate spaces.
Represented in Lean by explicit realizes/avoids bridge principles.
Represented as a binary agglomeration candidate theorem for required actions.
Represented as a binary union/agglomeration candidate theorem for forbidden actions.
